playbook.intent: Empty page → one published build-in-public tweet thread by EOD.
playbook.scope: One published tweet or short thread on the indie handle by end of day, surfacing concrete product progress, hooking a relevant audience, and feeding the weekly newsletter and audience funnel.

success-criteria.criterion: One published tweet or short thread
Anchored to a real build artefact
Logged in the hook bank for future remix

stage.name: Capture
stage.intent: Pick the day's most tweetable build moment.

tasks.task: Pick the single moment a stranger would react to
Note the angle: insight, screenshot, or ask

stage.decision-gate: Advance once a concrete moment is picked, even if rough.

stage.name: Draft
stage.intent: A tight tweet that opens with a hook and ends with a payoff.

tasks.task: Open with a hook from the swipe file
Close with a single CTA or question

stage.decision-gate: Advance once draft passes the 'would I screenshot this?' bar.

stage.name: Ship
stage.intent: Post and engage with early replies.

tasks.task: Publish during the peak engagement window
Reply to every reaction in the first hour
Log final engagement metrics in hook bank

stage.decision-gate: Done once posted and replies handled.

extra.value: [Thread campaigns — single daily post, Posting on non-X channels, Promo-only tweets without build signal]
[A handle with a defined positioning, 'Today''s actual build artefact (commit, screenshot, metric)']
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content daily-build-in-public-tweet --format md, agent: faion get-content daily-build-in-public-tweet --format context, json: faion get-content daily-build-in-public-tweet --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
